description: Immerse your new users in a unique welcome experience with our creative and customizable email template. Primarily designed for app-based businesses in the computer & internet sector, this template features stunning graphic design and illustration elements inspired by Asian aesthetics. The creative component is powered by undraw, ensuring a visually appealing introduction for your SaaS tool. This email template is not just about aesthetics; it also enables you to get to know your customers better by encouraging them to complete their profile. With its capacity to be customized according to your brand's unique style, this email template is the perfect tool to kickstart your marketing and design efforts, ensuring a warm welcome for your new users.
short_description: Engage new users with our customizable email template, ideal for app-based businesses in the computer & internet sector. Featuring Asian-inspired graphic design elements and powered by undraw for visual appeal. Encourage profile completion to understand your customers better. Perfect for kickstarting marketing and design efforts.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
